keywords.job: I am the Chief Huntsman of Thais.
keywords.name: I am Robin. Some call me Rob, others Woody.
keywords.time: Time... it's running that fast when you are as old as me.
keywords.king: I am his Master of the Hunt as I was his father's Master of the Hunt.
keywords.tibianus: I am his Master of the Hunt as I was his father's Master of the Hunt.
keywords.quentin: My buddy Quentin is getting old, too. Things were different in our youth.
keywords.lynda: So young and so beautiful! She makes even an old man as me... uhm... feel a bit younger again.
keywords.harkath: Another one of a few friends of my youth who's still left.
keywords.army: These kids call themselves an army... In the old times we had a REAL army, I tell ya...
keywords.general: These kids call themselves an army... In the old times we had a REAL army, I tell ya...
keywords.sam: I have not much use for heavy armor.
keywords.gorn: Sells a lot of useful stuff that guy. I rember the days when we were so poor that we could not afford anything the former owner offered.
keywords.frodo: Ah, I love that hut. I liked it as it was Iwan's hut, I loved it as it was Pridence's hut, and I think I will never stop to love this place.
keywords.elane: A master, or better mistress, of the bow. But with her big feet she just chases all game away.
keywords.muriel: These mages still give me shivers. I remember the first time this Ferumbras guy showed his ugly face here.
keywords.sorcerer: These mages still give me shivers. I remember the first time this Ferumbras guy showed his ugly face here.
keywords.gregor: Can you imagine this youngster handles a guild? Ah, come on.
keywords.marvik: Druids have their ways with nature, but they would rather cuddle a bear than hunting it.
keywords.druid: Druids have their ways with nature, but they would rather cuddle a bear than hunting it.
keywords.bozo: Such guys don't live long. The grandfather of our king had a new jester every season.
keywords.oswald: Oh, what a charming young man. He's often here asking me about my youth and the people I met in my life.
keywords.crunor: Crunor gives and takes. That is his way. As long as we don't hunt more then we need we are at balance with Crunor.
keywords.lugri: Can you imagine his father was such a fine guy? A shame what his son has become.
keywords.excalibug: I don't like swords in general.
keywords.news: News? In the woods I learn nothing of importance to the world.

texts: I am the Chief Huntsman of Thais.
